synthetic_prompts.complaint_chatbot_prompt: Ground the complaint chatbot in the uploaded repository evidence for 'retaliation grievance complaint appeal hearing due process tenant policy adverse action'. Use the uploaded materials (Governor of Oregon : Executive Orders : State of Oregon, # Complete DEI Audit Summary - Housing Authority of Clackamas County, # Risk Review (risk_score > 0)) as factual grounding, ask the user to connect each document to case-specific events, and identify missing timeline, actor, harm, and remedy facts.
synthetic_prompts.mediator_evaluation_prompt: Evaluate each uploaded evidence item for a housing_discrimination complaint about 'retaliation grievance complaint appeal hearing due process tenant policy adverse action'. For every document, determine what claim element it supports, what facts it proves directly, what facts remain missing, and what follow-up questions the mediator should ask before drafting a complaint.
synthetic_prompts.production_upload_prompt: A user uploads repository evidence for 'retaliation grievance complaint appeal hearing due process tenant policy adverse action'. Save each file into the complaint-generator evidence store, extract factual support from the parsed document, and route the uploaded materials through mediator evidence analysis before drafting or revising a complaint.

key_facts.grounding_note: Use the evidence as factual grounding and identify missing case-specific facts during questioning.

matched_rules.text: Grievance: Any dispute a tenant may have with respect to HACC action or failure to
If HUD has issued a due process determination, HACC may exclude from HACC grievance
In states without due process determinations, HACC must grant opportunity for grievance

matched_entities.name: Grievance: Any dispute a tenant may have with respect to HACC action or failure to
If HUD has issued a due process determination, HACC may exclude from HACC grievance
In states without due process determinations, HACC must grant opportunity for grievance
The notice must also state that the tenant may request a grievance hearing on the HACC’s
adverse action and will provide the subject of the record and the tenant a copy of such

matched_rules.text: Applicants or tenant families who wish to file a VAWA complaint against HACC may
HACC informal hearing process, does not preclude the family from exercising the right, that may
HACC must be the principal party initiating or sustaining the action to recover amounts due from

matched_entities.name: Applicants or tenant families who wish to file a VAWA complaint against HACC may
HACC informal hearing process, does not preclude the family from exercising the right, that may
HACC must be the principal party initiating or sustaining the action to recover amounts due from
HACC will inform the family of its policy regarding moves denied due to insufficient
See Chapter 9 for more detail on unit eligibility policies and process.

initial_complaint_text: I reported discrimination to human resources after my supervisor denied a promotion and made repeated comments about women not being fit for leadership. Two days later I was terminated.

conversation_history.content: I reported discrimination to human resources after my supervisor denied a promotion and made repeated comments about women not being fit for leadership. Two days later I was terminated.
I understand this can be stressful, and these details help me support you. What adverse action happened to you exactly, such as a denial, termination, or other loss of housing benefits?
I reported discrimination to human resources after my supervisor denied a promotion and made repeated comments about women not being fit for leadership. Two days later I was terminated.
